zh.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯
zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berven是Reginold Reignold Deol Berven的女兒，於1384年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。她於1402年與John Bestney I在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1458年在英國英格蘭享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Berven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Ordell, Ove.
Norwegian: habitational name from a farmstead named Berven, from berg ‘mountain, hill’ (Old Norse bjarg) + vin ‘meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berven was born in 1384, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Reginold Reignold Deol Berven. She married John Bestney I in 1402, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1458, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

ja.St Albans, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンス
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bervenは1384年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスでReginold Reignold Deol Bervenの娘として生まれた。1402年にイギリスでJohn Bestney Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1458年にイギリスイギリスで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Berven(은)는 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 Reginold Reignold Deol Berven의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1402년 영국에서 John Bestney I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.
